query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.role, COUNT(fa.id) as analysis_count 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN fundamental_analysis fa ON u.id = fa.user_id 
WHERE u.email = '3178903@qq.com' 
GROUP BY u.id;
